High Interest in Our Graduate Programs: Applications Increased by %48

In just its 10th year since its establishment, Ibn Haldun University continues to serve as a hub for high-quality research in the social sciences worldwide by admitting outstanding students to its undergraduate and graduate programs. In this context, applications to our graduate programs have increased by 48% compared to last year, while participation in the academic assessment exams has risen by 61%.

Our 53-Member Psychosocial Support Team Is in the Earthquake Zone for Psychosocial Support Activities

Since the earthquakes that occurred on February 6, Ibn Haldun University has been working to provide aid and heal the wounds of the earthquakes that were intensely felt in Kahramanmaraş, Hatay, Adıyaman, Malatya, Gaziantep, Şanlıurfa, Diyarbakır, Adana, Osmaniye, Kilis, Elazığ and their surroundings. We took it one step further and initiated psychosocial support activities in the area.

Through The Actions We Carry Out İn Accordance With Our Earthquake Action Plan, We Will Work Together To Heal The Wounds Of The Residents Of Kahramanmaraş And The Surrounding Area

As Ibn Haldun University, we keep a close eye on what is happening in the earthquake zone, where Kahramanmaraş is the epicenter.

We Will Heal The Wounds Together! We Hope Everything Will Get Better Soon

We are deeply grieved by the earthquake was centered in the Pazarcık district of Kahramanmaraş and was felt strongly in Gaziantep, Şanlıurfa, Diyarbakır, Adana, Adıyaman, Malatya, Osmaniye, Hatay, Kilis, and the nearby areas.
